name: skill-architect-git-upload
description: Upload a local Claude Code skill to a remote Git repository.

mode.description: Operating mode. 'init' runs/reruns setup. 'check' verifies sync state (no push). 'push' runs the full upload flow. 'standalone' (default) applies current config.

repo_url.description: Explicit upload repository URL. Takes precedence over all saved config.

skill_name.description: Target skill to upload. If omitted in standalone mode, a selection checklist runs. Pre-set when called from skill-architect.

caller.description: Calling context. 'skill-architect' skips skill selection and uses skill_name directly. 'standalone' shows the full selection checklist.
